title: Golden Globes Best Supporting Actress Analysis
text: Closing Odds: Amy Madigan (Weapons): +100 (50.00% implied probability); Teyana Taylor (One Battle After Another): +135 (42.55% implied probability); Inga Ibsdotter Lilleaas (Sentimental Value): +750; Ariana Grande (Wicked: For Good): +1000; Elle Fanning (Sentimental Value): +2700; Emily Blunt (The Smashing Machine): +3500. Pre-Event Prediction: The analyst favored Madigan, noting that industry notables had generated significant momentum for her role in Weapons. The prediction emphasized that Madigan had latched onto something really special and would likely dominate the vote. Actual Result: Teyana Taylor secured the upset victory at +135 odds. This represented the evening's most notable surprise in film categories, though still a modest upset. The analyst acknowledged afterward that industry praise for Madigan hadn't fully materialized into votes.
